zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote於1165年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特時，他的父親William de Basset of Sapcote31歲，母親de Stafford14歲。他和Elizabeth de Avenal至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1205年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote was born in 1165, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Basset of Sapcote, was 31 and his mother, de Stafford, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth de Avenal. He died in 1205, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote est né en 1165, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Basset of Sapcote, avait 31 ans et sa mère, de Stafford, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth de Avenal. Il est décédé en 1205, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote 1165 in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Basset of Sapcote 31 und seine Mutter de Stafford 14. Er hatte mit Elizabeth de Avenal mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1205 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote è nato il nel 1165 nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Basset of Sapcote, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, de Stafford, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth de Avenal. Morì nel 1205, nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Basset of Sapcoteが1165年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで生まれた時，父William de Basset of Sapcoteは31歳，母de Staffordは14歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Avenalとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1205年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote(이)가 1165년 영국 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Basset of Sapcote(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 de Stafford(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Avenal(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote nasceu em 1165, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Basset of Sapcote, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, de Stafford, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth de Avenal. Ele faleceu em 1205, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote родился в 1165 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Basset of Sapcote было 31 год, а матери, которую звали de Stafford, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Elizabeth de Avenal. Он умер в 1205 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Simon Basset of Sapcote nació en 1165, en Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Basset of Sapcote, tenía 31 años y su mamá, de Stafford, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth de Avenal. Murió en 1205, en Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
